member.name: M:StudentFood.MobileApp.Pages.ThemedConfirmPopupPage.ShowAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows the confirmation dialog and returns true if the user tapped Confirm, false if they tapped Cancel.

member.name: M:StudentFood.MobileApp.Pages.ThemedPromptPopupPage.ShowAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows the prompt dialog and returns the entered text if the user tapped Confirm, or null if they tapped Cancel.

member.name: T:StudentFood.MobileApp.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
